title: OP Cobblemon Extras - Gold & Silver Disks
description: Simple mod adding custom music disks. A collection of my favorites from PKMN G&S. Remastered as musik disks for playing on a jukebox.
body:
A small mod adding music disks and artwork from G&S (Gen 2).

Cobblemon isn't a requirement.

UPDATED 1.2+
CREEPERS CAN DROP MUSIC DISKS WHEN KILLED BY SKELETONS!

Check the gallery for paintings.
MOST of the paintings have the related musics included.

**G&S Tracks:**
-----------------------------------------
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
*Azalea Town

*Dance Theater  
*Ecruteak City  
*Game Corner  
*Indigo Plateau  
*PKMN Gym  
*Professor Oak Theme  
*Rocket Hideout  
*Route 1  
*Route 26  
*Route 29  
*Route 32  
*Ruins Of Alph  
*Slowpoke Well  
*Tin Tower  
*Victory Road  
*Violet City  
*Viridian City  

</details>
-----------------------------------------
Feel free to modify this or use in any mod pack. 
Hope you enjoy!   
  
  
If you like it, check out my other mods.  
  
  
## **Questions** or you found a **bug**?  
Please, let me know on **Discord**. I **WILL respond** to an issue!  
Create a private support ticket/conversation with this channel:  
([https://discord.gg/VNAWJnyr7f])  
or feel free to dm me a comment! <3
